Hestui's Unknown Warrior:
Well, that is very noble of you. And you helped me a lot, I will admit that. Anyway, all is well that ends well. there is nothing else to talk about.
Except maybe one thing. It's quite impolite to hide your name from the person who risked their life for you.
I am Akkan. That is all I can say for now.
I think it's time for us to go back.
